narrative:
Fowler Twp Only township has 1,754 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
